vocab.meaning: chế độ ăn giàu hàm lượng dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I prioritize a nutrient-dense diet packed with leafy greens and lean proteins to sustain my energy levels throughout the day.
To improve my muscular endurance, I incorporate high-repetition bodyweight exercises into my weekly routine.
Practicing yoga serves as an effective tool for stress mitigation, helping me stay grounded amidst a hectic work schedule.

vocab.meaning: sự ổn định của các cơ cốt lõi (cơ bụng, hông, lưng)
vocab.example: Pilates is my go-to activity for enhancing core stability and preventing long-term back issues.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái thể chất đỉnh cao
vocab.example: Consistency is key when you're aiming to maintain peak physical condition as you get older.
Swimming is an excellent way to boost cardiovascular health without putting too much strain on the joints.

vocab.meaning: kỷ luật trong việc ăn uống
vocab.example: Maintaining dietary discipline is often the hardest part of staying fit, especially during festive seasons.

vocab.meaning: giấc ngủ mang tính phục hồi
vocab.example: I've realized that seven hours of restorative sleep is just as important as the time I spend at the gym.

vocab.meaning: những thói quen ít vận động
vocab.example: I make a conscious effort to break my sedentary habits by taking short walks every hour while working.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng về tâm trí
vocab.example: Physical activity is a powerful catalyst for achieving mental equilibrium after a taxing week.
